title: Constitution of a Wildlife Crime Control Unit at the State Level and sub units at the District Level in the State of Meghalaya
KOLASIB TOWN SANITATION TASK FORCE  THUKHAWM
content:
179/2026-2027

Kolasib, 16th April, 2026: Vawiin khan Kolasib DC Conference Hall-ah Kolasib Bawrhsap (DC) leh Kolasib Town Sanitation Task Force  Chairman ni bawk, Pu H. Dolianbuaia hovin Kolasib Town Sanitation Committee an thukhawm a. He thutkhawmnaah hian Kolasib khawpui faina atana hmalakna tur pawimawh tak tak ngaihtuah ho a ni.

He hun kaihruaitu, Committee Chairman, Pu H. Dolianbuaia chuan thu sawiin, kum tin Mizoram pum huapa Khawpui Fai Inelna (Cleanliness Competition) buatsaih thinah Kolasib-in theih tawpa tan a lak a ngaih thu a sawi a. Pakhatna dinhmun luah thei turin mipui te inpekna a pawimawh thu a tarlang. Faina bakah khawtlang tichhetu ruihhlo do kawngah pawh mitin ten mawhphurhna la a, theih tawp chhuaha tan kan rual a tul hle a ni, a ti.

Kolasib District-in theihna (potential) a neih that zia tarlangin Bawrhsap chuan, "Kan leilung thatna te, thlai leh sangha tharchhuah kawngah te hian theihna kan nei tha hle a, heng kan thil neih thatte hi kan phochhuak (promote) tawk lo thin. Tourism lamah pawh hma sawn turin heng kan theihna te hi kan hman tangkai thiam a, tan kan lak thar a ngai a ni," tiin kalkhawmte a chah bawk.

Thutkhawmnaah hian Kolasib khawpui faina leh bawlhhlawh sawngbawl dan tur chungchang chipchiar taka ngaihtuahho a ni a. Hman khat daih plastic (Single Use Plastic - SUP) hman khap a nih thu uar zawka mipui zirtir nise tih a ni a. Bawlhhlawh a hmun lova paih te, a tawih thei (biodegradable) leh tawih theilo (non-biodegradable) mumal taka thliar hrang lo te chu Kolasib Town Solid Waste Management Bye-Laws hnuaiah Rs. 5,000/- thlenga pawisa chawitir (fine) theih an nih thu tarlan a ni.

Tin, Dihmuntlanga Solid Waste Management Centre chu a enkawltu hlui te hun a tawp tak avangin, a thara enkawltu tur zawn a nih chhung chu DUDO office-in an enkawl rih dawn thu tarlan a ni bawk. Heng bakah hian, Mizoram Khawpui Fai Inelna-a Kolasib khawpuiin pakhatna dinhmun a luah theih nan Sawrkar Department hrang hrangte, Village Council (VC) te leh NGO hrang hrangte inlungrual taka thawhhona tha neih a pawimawh zia thuk zawka sawiho a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmnaah hian Committee Chairman DC bakah hian, Pu Lalmuan puia, DLAO Kolasib, Pu H. Lalramliana, DUDO Kolasib leh Kolasib khaw chhunga veng hrang hranga Village Council President leh an aiawhte an kalkhawm a ni.

title: MAMIT DISTRICT AIDS PREVENTION & CONTROL COMMITTEE THUKHAWM
content:
178/2026-2027

Dated: Mamit the 16th of April,2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall,Mamit-ah District AIDS Prevention & Control Committee (DAPCC) chu Pu Suvigya S Chandra, District Bawrhsap hovin an thukhawm.

He hunah hian Mission AIDS Suraksha chungchang sawizauna neih a ni a. Mission AIDS Suraksha hi National AIDS Control Organisation (NACO), Ministry of Health and Family Welfare,Govt of India hnuaia hmalakna niin 219- high priority district -ah kalpui tur a ni a. He mission in a tum ber chu HIV AIDS natna vei tihhniam niin he natna avanga thihna tih tlem a ni a. Hemi atan hian awareness campaign kalpui that te, HIV testing uar tura mipui sawm, ART treatment lak that leh in entir that te an ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah NGO te, Kohhran leh khawtlang hruaitute nena thawho a tula hemi mission lama hmalatute nen awareness campaign chungchangah pawh in rawn chung zela kalpui a that thu sawi a ni.

Attachment

title: MAMIT DISTRICT TB FORUM COMMITTEE THUKHAWM
content:
177/2026-2027

Dated:Mamit the 16th of April,2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Mamit-ah District TB Forum Committee chu Pu Suvigya S Chandra, District Bawrhsap leh Chairman District TB Forum ni bawk hovin an thukhawm.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian TB Mukt Bharat Abhiyan Phase- II (Ni 100 chhung TB Campaign) Mamit district a kalpui mek chugchangah report ngaihthlak a ni a. Kum 2026 hian Mamit district-ah mi 43 in TB treatment an la mek a, TB patient hi mi 22 niin 100% treatment hlawhtling taka kalpui a ni a,TB natna vanga nunna chan an la awm lo. Campaign hi kalpui mek zel niin a thlawnin mitin tan TB test hi lak theih a ni.

District Bawrhsap chuan kohhran leh khawtlang hruaitute nena thawhho chu a pawimawh thu a sawi a, he campaign hlawhtlinna atan theihtawp chhuaha mipuite hnenah test la tura fuih turin a ngen a ni.

Attachment

title: MAMIT DISTRICT LEVEL GOVT LAND AUTHORITY COMMITTEE THUKHAWM
content:
176/2026-2027

Dated: Mamit the 16th of April,2026:Vawiin khan District Level Govt Land Authority chu DC Conference Hall, Mamit-ah Pu Suvigya S Chandra, District Bawrhsap hovin an thukhawm

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Mamit district a De-addiction centre/ drug treatment facility sakna hmun tur sawi ho a ni a, hmun  remchang leh mipuite pan awlsamah sak nise tia rel a ni a, a hmun la sawi fel a ni lo. District Bawrhsap chuan drugs a buai mi tam tak tan he centre hi Mamit district tan a hluin hmasawnna tam tak a thlen dawn a, khawtlang hruaitute nen tangruala thawhho that a tul a ni a ti.

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP LEH DRUG REDUCTION  SQUAD (CYLA) TE INKAWM
content:
174/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 16th April 2026:Vawiin khan Lawngtlai bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Central Young Lai Association hnuaia Drug Reduction Squad (DRS) te a Office Chamber-ah kawmin, hmalakna tur kawng hrang hrang leh thawhho dan tur a sawipui.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Drug Reduction Squad (DRS) Member - lo kalte hnena lawmthu sawina a nei a. CYLA - ten ruihho do tura Drug Reduction Squad an dinthar leh chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, chak taka hma la zel turin a chah a. Ruihhlo Do kawngah sawrkarin theihtawp a chhuah mek laiin, Drug Reduction Squad - te chu kut ke pawimawh tak an ni tiin, kawng hrang hrangah thawhho a tul hle a ti a. A bik takin Ruiho do beihpui 'Operation Jericho ' hnuaia thawhhona tha tak awm chu chhunzawm zel a tul hle a ni, a ti.

Bawrhsap chuan Ruihhlo tirem tura hmalaknaah sawrkar leh DRS - te hmalakna chu mipuite pawhin an thlawp that a pawimawh tak zet a ti a. Ruihhloin mimal, chhungkua, khawtlang, ram leh hnam a tichhiat nasat zia chhûtin, tha thlah theih a ni tih tarlangin, chawl lo a hmalak zel a tul a ti a. Taksa mai piah lamah thlarau damna chu thil pawimawh tak a ni tih tarlangin, hemi kawngah hian chak zawka hmalak puiah DRS- re a sawm a . Lawngtlai District chu ruihhlo awm lohna (Drug Free District ) a siam turin theihtawp chhuah mek a nih tur thu sawiin, Mipuite thawhpuina a sawm nghal bawk.

Drug Reduction Squad-  hrautute chuan  DRS  chu 2022 atang din tawh a nih thu tarlangin, vawiin thkengin chak takin hma an lak reng thu an sawi a.Ruihhlo do kawngah DRS leh sawrkar thawhho chu pawimawh hle a an hriat  thu sawiin, mipuite tana thawkho turin an inoeih reng thu an tarlang a ni.

Thutkhawm chuan Ruihhlo do kawngah chak zawka hmalak ni se, a theihna chin chinah hmalak tlan zel ni se an ti a. Thlarau damna leh piantharna  chu pawimawh hle nia an hriat thu tarlangin, Salvarion Camping- pawh huaihawt ngei ni se an ti a. Hemi atan hian sum leh pai mamawh a tam dawn a, a tul anga ngsihtuahho ni se, Organising Committee- pawh mumal taka din ni se an ti a. Ruihhlo do kawngah sawrkarin 'Operation Jericho' a kalpui mek chu chhunzawm zel tha ti tlangin, duty - leh tul dangah hmalakho zel ni se an ti a ni. Vawi leh khatah hmalakna tur zawi kim vek theih a ni lo tih pawm tlangin, May thla chhung ngeiin thutkhawm hi neih leh ni se an ti a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Drug Reduction Squad (DRS) hruaitute  an tel kim tha hle a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawina neiin hun a khar.

Attachment

title: LUNGLEIAH CHAPCHAR KUT 2026 HMAN DAN THLIR LET A NI
content:
173/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭau thla ni 16:Vawiin khan Lunglei District Chapchar Kut 2026 Organising Committee chu an Chairman, Additional Deputy Commissioner Pi Zoramdini kaihhruaiin Lunglei DC Conference Hall-ah an ṭhu khawm a. March ni 13, 2026 (Zirtawpni)-a Lungleia C. Ṭhuamluaia Muala Chapchar Kut hman dan an thlir let.

Chairman Pi Zoramdini chuan Lungleiah Chapchar Kut 2026 hlawhtling leh hlung taka hman a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Organising Committee member-te inpekna leh ṭan rualna te, mawhphurhna hrang hrang neite ṭhahnem ngaihna leh inpekna leh District mipuite phurpuina leh ṭawiawmna vang a nih thu sawiin, lawm thu a sawi.

He hunah hian Organising Committee Secretary Pu Zothanzuala Hnamte chuan Chapchar Kut inbuatsaihna kalpui dan leh Kut hman dan report tlangpui tar langin, sawrkar department hrang hrangte, Lunglei Municipal Council (LMC), YMA, MHIP, MUP, MCO, MCAA, MJA, LPA, Clean Lunglei leh mawhphurhna leh chanvo hrang hrang neite inpekna leh thawh hona ṭha tak avangin lawm thu a sawi a. Finance Manager, Sub-Divisional Officer (Sadar) Pi TT Beikhaizi chuan sum hman dan leh sum dinhmun report a pe bawk.

He hunah hian member-te'n Chapchar Kut hman dan thlir letin, Chapchar Kut hlung taka hman a ni chu lawmawm an tih thu an sawi a. Chapchar Kut hmannaa thil chhinchhiah tlak leh zawngchhang chi te, hmasawn ngaihna laite tar langin, kum danga hlawhtling leh hlung taka Chapchar Kut hman a nih zel theih nana rawtna leh duhthusam an neih hrang hrangte an sawi ho.

Attachment

title: SAMPOORNATA ABHIYAN 2.0 CONCLUDES IN LUNGSEN; "I KAWTKAIAH SAWRKAR" PROGRAMME HELD
LUNGSEN ASPIRATIONAL BLOCK-AH SAMPOORNATA ABHIYAN 2.0 KHARNA LEH "I KAWTKAIAH SAWRKAR" HUN HMAN A NI
MIZORAMAH SANGHA THIANGHLIM ZAWK LAKLUH LEH EI A NIH THEIH DAN TUR FISHERIES DEPARTMENT LEH FOOD & DRUGS ADMINISTRATION LAMIN AN SAWIHO.
content:
171/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 16th April, 2026 :Vawiin April ni 16,2026 khan Fisheries Department Secretary, Er Lalrothanga hovin a pisa-ah Sangha thianghlim zawk lakluh leh zawrh chhuah chungchang sawihona hi neih a ni a. Fisheries Departments leh Food & Drugs Administration lam officials te an tel a ni.

Mizoram hian sangha kan kham khawp kan la thar chhuak thei lova, engemawzat phai atangin lakluh a la ngai a, Fisheries Department chhinchhiah danin kum khatah 11808qtls vel lalut angin tarlan a ni a. Mizoramin sangha a tharchhuah tamna Kolasib leh Mamit District ami te chu State dangah a tam zawk hralh chhuah thin a nih thu leh kan sangha mamawh tam zawk hi phai a tanga lakluh thin a nih thu sawiin Er. Lalrothanga chuan Mizorama sangha thar chhuah te Mizoram chhung ngeia hralh chhuak thei tura a zuartute pawh hmalak pui a ngaih thu a sawi a, tin heng kan sangha eite pawnlam atanga lakluh leh Mizorama thar ngeite pawh hi a thianghlim tawk em tih enfiah a tul a, Sangha hi Fisheries Department enkawl a a nih laiin hmun dang atanga lakluh leh a thianghlim leh thianghlim loh endik ah erawh chuan thuneihna an neih loh thu sawiin hemi enfiah dan tur  hi Standard Operating Procedure mumal tak  siam vat a tul thu a sawi a.

Food & Drugs Administration lam aiawh, Pi Lalrinkimi Pachuau, Designated Officer(Food Safety)  chuan an hmalakna te sawiin FDA in state dang aṭanga sangha lo lut  endikna an lo neih tawh dan a report a.  Amaherawhchu thawktu leh sum indaihlohna avangin regular taka endikna an kalpui theih loh thu an sawi bawk.  National Food Safety & Standards Act hnuaiah eitur zuartute mai bakah a hlawma lalut tuten lakluh phalna leh zawrh phalna nei turin an hnen atangin certificate an neih a ngaih thu leh, dan an zawm loh chuan hrem theih an nih thu sawiin, sangha thianghlim leh hrisel zawrh leh hralh a nih theihna tura SOP siam ngei ṭha a tih thu a sawi bawk.

Kalkhawmte chuan Mizoram sangha tharte State pawna thawnchhuak lova mipuite hnena lei theiha siam chu tul an ti hle a, a bak mamawh state dang atanga lakluh tur pawh a thianghlim thei ang ber lakluh anih theih nana hmalak ho dan turte an rel a. Health Department hnuaia Food & Drugs Administration lamin Standard Operating procedure hi rawn duang se, a tul ang angin Fisheries Department in lo puibawm se, thawktu leh sum mamawh angte chu Sorkarah dil ve mai ni se an ti a ni. Sangha zuara eizawngte pawh Mizorama tharchhuah ngei sangha a tam thei ang ber an zawrh dan ngaihtuah tura hmalak pui dan zawn pawh an ngai hle a, pawnlam atanga lakluh pawh thianghlim zawk lakluh anih theih nana hmalak pui dan zawn dan turte SoP ah hian dah tel ni se an ti a ni.

Attachment

title: MLA PU JEJE LALPEKHLUA'N SOUTH TUIPUI LEH DARZO CLUSTER DEVELOPMENT HNUAIA BENEFICIARIES-TE HNENAH PUAN TAHNA KHAWL A SEM
content:
170/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial, the 16th April, 2026: Vawiin khan South Tuipui Bialtu MLA, Pu Jeje Lalpekhlua chuan Hnahthial Commerce & Industries Department Conference Hall-ah National Handloom Development hnuaia Hnahthial District Cluster Development Programme pahnih - S. Tuipui leh Darzo Cluster chhunga beneficiaries sawmkua pahnih (92) te hnenah Puan tahna khawl - HSS leh a accessories-te chu khuallian niin a sem a. Addl DC, Pu Zothanmawia Khiangte chu khual zahawm niin semna programme hi Pu HB Lalremmawia, DCIO chuan a kaihruai a ni.

Khuallian chuan handloom chu MLA a nihna anga hma a lakna hmasa ber pawl a nih thu sawiin puan tahna khawl sem a nih chhan chu puan tah lama tui mi ten an thiamna te an pho chhuah a, an thiamna hmanga ei an zawn theih chu a nih thu a sawi a. Hnahthialah hian puan tah lama tui leh thiam tak tak an awma a hriat thu sawiin kan tum phawt chuan Mizoram mai ni lo, hnam dang hnena hralh chhuah tlak khawpa quality tha kan siam chhuah theih thu a sawi a ni.

Tourism lama kan than zel thu sawiin Aizawl lamah phei chuan khualzin ten handloom an demand nasat thu a sawi a. Chuvang chuan a ti tak tak te tan chuan eizawnna chhenfakawm tak siam theihna  a nih thu sawiin chumi a thlen theih nan a dawngtu tur dik tak hnenah he thil hi a thlen ngei a beisei thu a sawi bawk.

Hnahthial-ah hmalakna hrang hrang a awm chhoh zel thu sawiin office building hrang hrang pawh sak chhoh zel a nih tur thu a tarlang a. Tui lakna tha leh changtlung zawk Hnahthial-in a neih theih nan cheng nuai 600 chu SASCI atangin an rawn dah thu sawiin Health Department-in an dawn atangin - Blood bank refrigerator chu Health Minister duhsakna zarah Hnahthial pawhin an neih thuai tur thu a sawi a ni.

Khual zahawm pawhin thusawina hun hmangin puan tahna khawl chu a hmanna tur dik taka hman a nih ngei theih a beisei thu a sawi a. Mipuite chu office tinte chhawr tangkai turin a chah nghal a ni.

Technical Report, Pu Zorinpuia, Cluster Development Executive hnen atanga ngaihthlak a nih hnu in Pi Vanlalnunfeli, CDE chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

South Tuipui Cluster Development Programme hnuaiah hian khua panga - S. Tuipui, S. Vanlaiphai, S. Chawngtui, Cherhlun leh Thingsai te awmin a vaiin beneficiaries 61 an awm a. Darzo Cluster Development Programme hnuaiah Darzo khua awmin beneficiaries 31 an awm a ni.

MLA, Pu Jeje Lalpekhlua chuan puan tahna khawl phur motor-te a vailiam hnu in Southern High School atanga Thingsai panna kawng siamthat hnathawh chu a endik nghal a ni.

Attachment

title: EXCISE & NARCOTICS DEPARTMENT COMMISSIONER-IN SAITUAL EXCISE & NARCOTICS STATION A ENDIK
content:
169/2026-2027

Saitual, the 16th April, 2026:Vawiin khan Saitual Excise & Narcotics Station-ah Annual inspection neih niin, Excise & Narcotics Department Commissioner, Pu Z. Lalhmangaiha leh inspecting team te chuan a hmunah tlawhin an endik a,  Pu Lalhmingthanga, Saitual District Assistant Commissioner kaihhruainain mamawh leh duhzawng sawina hun - Durbar neih nghal a ni bawk.

END Commissioner Pu Z. Lalhmangaiha chuan thu sawiin harsatna awm loa Mizoram chhunga district hrang hranga annual inspection an kalpui thei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a, Saitual END station-a thawktute chu inthlahrung lo a an mamawh te thlen turin a sawm a, a theih ang anga puih a inhuam thu a sawi bawk. END chu sawrkarin theih tawp a chhuahpui tih sawiin, lirthei leh hmanruaah te pawh hma an sawn hle a ni, a ti a, sawrkar tan leh ram leh hnam tana theih tawp chhuah chu a thawktute bat a ni, a ti.

END Commissioner chuan Mizoram harsatna lian tak chu ruihhlo hi a ni, a ti a, END-a thawktute chu chumi do tura hna thawk an ni tih inhre thar tura chahin, lungawi tak leh thahnemngai taka an hna chu thawk chhunzawm zel tur leh khatlawng hruaitute leh NGO te nen thawhhona tha tak nei chhunzawm zel turin a fuih a ni.

Tun dinhmunah hian Saitual District Assistant Commissioner of Excise and Narcotics Office hnuaiah hian thawktu 13 an awm mek a,  Assistant Commissioner hona hnuaiah OC pakhat, SI pakhat, ASI pakhat, Wireless Operator pakhat, Constable pasarih leh 4th Grade pakhat an awm mek a ni.

Attachment

title: NATIONAL BAMBOO MISSION LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT THUKHAWM
content:
168/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 16th April 2026:Vawiin khan 'National Bamboo Mission, Lawngtlai District' chuan an Chairman leh Bawrhsap nibawk Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihhruaiin a Office Chamber-ah thutkhawm an nei.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kalkhawmte hnena lawmthu sawina a nei hmasa a. Mau tangkaina kawng hrang hrang a tam hle tih tarlangin, a chin  leh enkawl kawngah chak zawka hmalak a tul hle a ti a. Tun dinhmunah  National Bamboo Mission hnuaia Lawngtlai District - telh a la ni lo chu mimal taka veiawm a tih thu tarlangin, Lawngtlai District - ah kalpui a nih ngei theih nan hmalak a nih tur thu a sawi a. Nations Bamboo Mission - hnuaia tanpuina  leh hamthatna awm ang angte Lawngtlai District - ah kalpui a nih theih nan theihtawp chhuah a tul takzet tih tarlangin, hemi kawngah hian sawrkar lamah ziaka  thlen a nih tur thu a sawi a. Bawrhsap chuan  Lawngtlai District chhunga Mau chingtute tan hamthatna siam leh mi tam zawkin eizawnna atan a an hman chu tihmakmawh a nih thu tarlangin, chak taka hmalak a nih tur thu a tarlang bawk.

Pi Laldintluangi Ralte,  Member Secretary chuan National Bamboo Mission - kalpui dan tlangpui sawizauna a nei a. Mizoram Sate Bamboo Mission chu kum  2018 atang khan Horticulture Department - ten  an kalpui  tan tih tarlangin, hlawhtling taka kalpui mek zel niin, a bik takin Area expansion-  chak zawka kalpui a nih thu a sawi a. Mizoram Bamboo Centre, Lengpuiah Mau  atanga thil siam chhuah dan chi hrang hrang zirtirna kalpu a nih thu sawiin, mi tam takin an chhawr tangkai mek a ni, a ti.

Thutkhawmah hian thil pawimawh tak tak sawiho a ni a. Mau atanga thil siam chhuah dan zir kawngah Lawngtlai District- atanga trainee tam zawk awm thei tura hmalak ni se an ti a. Mau chin leh enkawl, tharchhuah kawngah mi tam zawkin eizawnna atan a an hman theih nan Slscheme kalpui tura tan lak thar ni se an ti a ni. Mau chin leh tharchhuah kawngah a ram leilung dinhmun kimchang  a hmunah kala zirchianna neih ni se, zau zawka ching tura hmalak ni se an ti a ni. Mau chi ( Species) tha leh a ram leilungin a ngeih tur zirchianna kalpui ni se an ti bawk a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian ' National Bamboo Mission, Lawngtlai District' Member- te an tel kim tha hle a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawina neiin hun a khar.

Attachment

title: KOHHRAN HRUAITUTE TAN NAUPANG VENHIM KAWNGA HRIATTUR PAWIMAWH INZIRTIRNA HUN HMANG
content:
167/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial, the 16th April 2026:Vawiin khan Hnahthial DC Conference Hall-ah District Child Welfare and Protection Committee, Hnahthial District buatsaihin - "Sensitization Programme on Child Protection and its Related Issues For Church Leaders" chu neih a ni a. Bawrhsap, Pi K. Vanlalruati chuan khuallian niin he Sensitization Programme hi a hawng a, Pi F. Lalnuntluangi, CDPO chuan program hi a kaihruai a ni.

Bawrhsap chuan khawvel changkang zelah naupang venhimna uluk lehzual a tul tawh takzet thu sawiin chumi kawngah chuan kohhran chu sikul tluk zeta inzirtirna hmun pawimawh a nih thu a sawi a. Kohhran zirtirna chu naupang venhim leh than lenna kawnga pawimawh tak mai, mipui te pawhin a kan innghahna, kan kulhpui nghet leh mipui nuna thleng thuk ber a nih avangin kohhran kohhran hruaitute tan he programme hi buatsaih an nih thu a sawi a ni.

Bawrhsap chuan naupang kum tling lo tana dan pawimawh tak pahnih - Juvenile Justice Act, 2015 leh POCSO Act, 2012 chungchang sawi zauna neiin dan ang taka kum tling lo dan bawhchhiate nun siamthat tum a nih dan leh naupang kum tling lo chunga dik lo taka che thinte chunga hremna awm theih dan te a sawi a. Mizote chu inngaidam mai thin hnam kan ni chu thil tha tak a nih rualin dan bawhchhiate an huangtau phah thin thu a sawi a. Chuvangin ngaihdam chin tawk hria a, naupang chunga dik lo taka che thin leh chet tum an awm chuan a rang thei ang bera thuneitute hnena report vat zel turin kalkhawmte chu a chah a ni.

Hawnna programme-ah hian Dr. R. Lalrinhlua, DCPO chuan kalkhawmte lawmna thuchah sawiin Lalvenhima Khawlhring, Supervisor, Child Helpline Unit chuan lawmthu sawiin a khar a. Chawhnu program - Technical Session-in a chhunzawm nghal a ni.

Attachment

title: NATIONAL FAMILY BENEFIT SCHEME (NFBS) TANPUINA DAWNG TUR THLANG CHHUAK
content:
166/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, 16th April 2026:Vawiin khan Serchhip District Bawrhsap Pu Paul L. Khuma kaihhruaina hnuaiah National Family Benefit Scheme (NFBS) hnuaia tanpuina dawng tur thlangin thutkhawm, DC Meeting Hall-ah neih a ni.

He thutkhawmah hian National Family Benefit Scheme hnuaia dilna thehluttu chhungkaw 26 zing atangin, chhungkaw 10 thlan chhuah an ni. Member-te chuan diltu hrang hrangte dinhmun uluk taka an thlir ho hnuah he thutlukna hi an siam a ni.

Meeting-ah hian Project Director Dr. Malsawmtluanga Fanchun; SDO (Sadar) Pi Rebecca Laldinmawii Hrahsel; SDC Pu Vanthangpuia leh District Social Welfare Office aiawhte bakah NGO, Sub-Headquarters YΜΑ, Mizoram Upa Pawl (MUP) leh MHIP hruaitute an tel bawk.

National Family Benefit Scheme hi chhungkua, eizawngtu berin a boralsante chhawmdawlna atana duan a ni a. Chhungkaw pakhatah 20,000/- (singhnih) vawikhat tanpuina (one-time grant) pek an ni thin. He tanpuina dawng theite hi Below Poverty Line (BPL) chhungkua an nih a ngai a, eizawngtu boraltate chu kum 18 atanga 60 inkar an nih a ngai a ni.

Attachment

title: MIZORAM GOVERNOR INITIATES HOUSELISTING AND HOUSING CENSUS 2027
content:
25/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 16th April, 2026:Mizoram Governor, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd), formally marked the commencement of the intensive Houselisting and Housing Census operations under the Census of India 2027 at Lok Bhavan in Aizawl this morning. With this event, Mizoram has joined the rest of the country in commencing the House Listing and Housing Census operations.

Mizoram Governor, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh urged all census field functionaries to discharge their duties with utmost dedication and sincerity, ensuring that no household is left behind. He instructed them to explain the process clearly to those who may have difficulty understanding, so that every individual and household can be properly enumerated. Describing this as India’s first-ever Digital Census, he expressed confidence in its successful completion and appealed to the public to extend full cooperation to the census officials and enumerators.

On the occasion, Mrs. H. Lalremruati, appointed as Enumerator for Lok Bhavan, successfully entered the required details using the Self Enumeration ID (SE ID) generated from the Governor’s Self Enumeration exercise conducted on 7 April 2026. With this entry, the Governor has formally completed his own Houslisting and Housing Census.

The event was attended by senior officials from the Directorate of Census Operations, including Mr. Joseph H. Lalramsanga, Municipal Commissioner & Principal Census Officer, Mrs. Irene Zohlimpuii Chongthu, Addl. Secretary, GAD & Addl. State Nodal Officer and other officials.

The Census 2027, India’s first digital census, will be conducted in two phases. The first phase - the Houselisting and Housing Census - began on 1 April, 2026. The second phase, Population Enumeration, is scheduled for February 2027. Under the first phase, Self-Enumeration was carried out across the country from 1 April, 2026 to 15 April, 2026. The Houselisting and Housing Census operations will continue from 16 April, 2026 to 15 May, 2026.

Following the enumeration of the Governor, Chief Minister Mr. Lalduhoma was successfully enumerated today at 1:00 PM by the concerned enumerator at his office. The process was conducted seamlessly after the Chief Minister had completed his self-enumeration on 1st April, 2026. Other dignitaries enumerated today included Home Minister Mr. K. Sapdanga and PWD Minister Mr. Vanlalhlana, who were also enumerated at their respective residences at 11:00 AM in the presence of senior officers from the General Administration Department, Aizawl Municipal Corporation and the Directorate of Census Operations.

The Government encourages all residents to provide accurate information to the Census Enumerators who are undertaking house to house visit and help support the smooth and efficient conduct of the Census.

Attachment

title: THO LAW DIR TUAH’ (STANDUP LAWNGTLAI) LAUNCHED IN LAWNGTLAI
content:
24/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 16th April 2026: The launch programme of “Tho Law Dir Tuah” (Standup Lawngtlai) was held today at the DC Conference Hall, Lawngtlai. The programme was chaired by the Deputy Commissioner of Lawngtlai, Shri  Donny Lalruatsanga, and was formally inaugurated by Dr. Lorrain Lalpekliana Chinzah, Adviser to the Chief Minister (Health & Family Welfare and Agriculture & Farmers Welfare) and MLA of Lawngtlai East, who attended as the Chief Guest. The function was also attended by Shri  C. Lalsawmzuala, Chief Executive Member (LADC), and Shri JB Vanhoy, Executive Member (LADC).

In his address, Dr. Lorrain Lalpekliana Chinzah expressed his appreciation for the initiative, stating that “Tho Law Dir Tuah” will play an important role in improving urban management and development in Lawngtlai, benefiting all residents. He emphasized the importance of coordinated efforts between the State Government and the Lai Autonomous District Council (LADC), expressing hope that the initiative would strengthen collaboration.He noted that Lawngtlai District has significant potential for development compared to other districts in Mizoram. With joint efforts from both governments, new progress and tangible outcomes can be achieved, leading to greater public satisfaction. He highlighted key focus areas such as cleanliness, sanitation, traffic management, and parking, stressing the need for collective responsibility and cooperation.

He further emphasized that not only the government but also Village Councils, NGOs, churches, and the general public have vital roles to play in achieving meaningful development. He called upon all stakeholders to contribute actively and work together with dedication and a sense of responsibility.

The Adviser also assured that, in his capacity as MLA, he would continue to work diligently towards making Lawngtlai a more livable and developed district. He encouraged all government departments to work with commitment and love for the district. He stressed that sustainable development cannot be achieved by individuals or groups alone, but requires collective effort from everyone.

Shri C. Lalsawmzuala, in his speech, assured full support from LADC towards the success of the initiative. He stressed the need for strong coordination between LADC and the District Administration and expressed his personal commitment to the development of Lawngtlai. He urged the public to actively participate in maintaining cleanliness, proper waste management, and in combating drug abuse.

Shri Donny Lalruatsanga, Deputy Commissioner, highlighted various areas where Lawngtlai needs improvement, especially in sanitation, beautification, and traffic management. He appealed for active cooperation from community organizations such as Tlawmngai Pawl, Village Councils, churches, and the general public. Shri JB Vanhoy, Executive Member (LADC) in charge of Sanitation, also spoke on the occasion, reiterating the commitment to improve sanitation and overall development in Lawngtlai through dedicated efforts.

During the programme, Shri  PC Lalchunglura, Superintendent of Police, delivered a welcome address. A PowerPoint presentation was given by Shri  Jammy Vanhmingliana, SDC. The programme concluded with a vote of thanks delivered by Shri  H.C. Vanlalruatpuia, District Council Transport Officer.

Attachment

title: LARSAP-IN CHHIARPUI 2027 ATAN HOUSELISTING AND HOUSING INZIAHLUH BUL A TAN
content:
165/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 16th April, 2026: Mizoram Larsap, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) chuan vawiin chawhma khan India ram Chhiarpui 2027 atana Mizoram puma Houselisting and Housing kalpui tur inziahluh bultanna Lok Bhavan, Aizawlah a nei. Hemi hnu hian ram chhung hmun dangte rualin Mizoramah Houselisting and Housing chhiarpui kalpui tan a ni.

Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh chuan chhiarpui buaipuitute chu hmaih awm lo tura theihtawp chhuah tura chahin, hriat thiam loh neite pawh tha taka hrilhfiah zela, India ram chhiarpuia inziaklut vek thei tura tan la turin a chah a. A vawi khat nana digital census kalpui a ni chu phurawm a tih thu sawiin, a hlawhtlin ngei theih nan mipuite pawh chhiarpui buaipuitute tha taka lo tawiawm turin a chah bawk.

He hunah hian Lok Bhavan atana Enumerator ruat Pi H. Lalremruati chuan Larsap-in April ni 7, 2026 a Self Enumeration a lo tih tawh atanga Self Enumeration ID (SE ID) a dawn hmangin tul angte a tifel a, Larsap hian Houselisting and Housing a zo fel a ni.

Mizorama Houselisting and Housing bultannaah hian Directorate of Census Operations atangin Pu Joseph H. Lalramsanga, Municipal Commissioner cum Principal Census Officer, Pi Irene Zohlimpuii Chongthu, Addl. Secretary, GAD & Addl. State Nodal Officer leh official dangte'n Larsap hi an tawiawm a ni.

Chhiarpui 2027 hi India rama digital census hmasa ber tur niin, thawh hniha kalpui tur a ni a. Thawh khatna Houselisting and Housing hi April 1, 2026 atang khan kalpui tan a ni a. Thawh hnihna, Population Enumeration hi February 2027-ah neih tan tur a ni thung ang. Thawh khatna hnuaiah hian April 1, 2026 atanga April 15, 2026 chhung khan mahni inziahluh Self-Enumeration neih a lo ni tawh a, vawiin April 16, 2026 atanga May 15, 2026 thleng hian Houselisting and Housing kalpui a ni ang.

Larsap-in Houselisting and Housing a tih fel hnu hian Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma chuan chawhnu dar 1 khan a Pisa-ah April ni 1, 2026 a Self Enumeration a lo tih tawh behchhanin Houselisting and Housing a ti fel a. Sawrkar hotu dang vawiina census enumeration tite zingah Home Minister Pu Sapdanga leh PWD Minister Pu Vanlalhlana te pawh telin, an chenna inah chawhma dar 11 khan bialtu Census Enumerator-te'n General Administration Department, Aizawl Municipal Corporation leh Directorate of Census Operations hotute hriatpuiin an tifel a ni.

Sawrkar chuan tluang leh felfai taka chhiarpui kalpui anih theih nan mipuite chu anmahni rawn pan chilhtu Census Enumerator-te tha taka lo tawiawm tur leh, an hriat duhte tha leh dik taka lo chhang turin a ngen a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAIAH 'THO LAW DIR TUAH' (Standup Lawngtlai) HAWNNA NEI
content:
164/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 16th April 2026:Vawiin khan 'Tho Law Dir Tuah' (Standup Lawngtlai) hawnna inkhawm chu  DC Conference Hall-ah neih a ni a. Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kaihruaiin, Dr. Lorrain Lalpekliana Chinzah, Adviser to Chief Minister (H& FW, A& FW)  leh Lawngtlai East bialtu MLA nibawk chuan Khuallian niin hawnna a nei. Pu C. Lalsawmzuala, Chief Executive Member, LADC leh Pu JB Vanhoy, EM, LADC - te chuan an hmanpui.

Dr. Lorrain Lalpekliana Chinzah chuan Lawngtlai khawpuia hmasawnna  leh inrelbawlna tha zawk awm tura mitin chhawr theih tura 'Tho Law Dir Tuah'  lawm taka a hawn thu a sawi a. Lawngtlaiah State sawrkar leh LADC- te pheikhairual taka an kal dun a pawimawh hle tih tarlangin 'Tho Law Dir Tuah' chuan thawhhona tha zawk a thleng ngei a beisei tih a tarlang a. Lawngtlai District - chu Mizoram District dangte nen tehkhinin hmasawnna tur a tam hle a, sawrkar pahnih kalkawp a nih angin tha zawka hnathawh a nih chuan hmasawnna rahbi thar kai a ni dawn a, chu chuan mipuiteah lungawina a thlen ngei ang a ti. A bik takin Faina leh thianghlimna, traffic leh motor parking lamah tan lak thar a ni tur chu lawmawm a tih thu tarlangin, theihtawpa thawhho erawh a pawimawh dawn hle a ni, a ti. Hmasawnna tha zawk awm turin sawrkar bakah VC, NGO, Kohhran leh mipuite an pawimawh dawn hle tih tarlangin, theih ang anga sawrkar tawiawm thn turin a sawm a ni.

Adviser to Chief Minister chuan khawpui nuam leh District changkang zawka siam turin MLA a nihna anga tha hnem ngai taka a thawh zel tur thu  a sawi a. Hemi kawngah hian sawrkar department - te Lawngtlai hmangaihna nena thawk turin a fuih a. Hlawhtlinna leh hmasawnna tlian tling awm turin mimal emaw pawl hming khat anga hmalak mai theih a ni lo tih tarlangin, mitinin mahni zawn theuhah thahnem ngai taka thawh a tul a ni, a ti. Lawngtlai District- nuam zawk leh chhenfakawm siam turin a chhunga chengte an pawimawh tak zet tih tarlangin Dr. Lorrain Lalpekliana Chinzah chuan ram leh hnam hmangaihna nena theihtawp chhuah zel turin sawrkar department leh mipuite a sawm nghal bawk.

Pu C. Lalsawmzuala chuan 'Tho Law Dir Tuah' hlawhtlinna turin LADC chuan theihtawp a chhuah tur thu a tarlang a. Hemi kawngah hian LADC leh District Administration - te thawhhona tha tak a awm a tul tiin, tha taka thawhho a nih tur thu a sawi a. Lawngtlai khawpui hmasawnna tura thawh chu mimal taka a vei thu tarlangin, thahnem ngai taka a thawh tur thu a sawi a. Lairam mipuite faina leh thianghlimna, lirthei enkawl kawngah leh Ruihhlo kdo kawngah ding nghet Ngam turin a fuih a. Lawngtlai khawpui nuam leh felfai zawk siam turin thawhhona tha a awm a tul dawn hle a, State sawrkar, LADC, VC, NGO, Kohhran leh mipuite thawhpuiah a sawm nghal a ni.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Lawngtlai khawpuiin kawng hrang hranga hmasawnna tur a ngsh hle tih a tarlang a. A bik takin  faina leh thianghlimna, khawpui cheimawi leh Traffic Management - lamah tan lak a nih tur thu a sawi a. Khawpui nuam leh mawi, inrelbawlna felfai zawk siam tura District Administration leh LADC - ten theihtawp an chhuah turah Tlawmngai Pawl, Village Council, Kohhran leh mipuite tawiawmna tha a ngen a ni.

Pu JB Vanhoy, EM, LADC, i/c Sanitation Department-  pawhin thutawi sawina neiin, Lawngtlai khawpui hmasawnna tura hmalakna turah theihtawp chhuah a ni ang a ti a. Lawngtlai khawpuiin hmasawnna tur kawng hrang hrang a nei tih tarlangin, a bik takin faina leh thianghlimna kawngah theihtawp chhuah a nih tur thu a sawi.

Vawiin hun hmannaah hian Pu PC Lalchunglura, Superintendent of Police,  chuan kalkhawmte lawmna thu sawiin, Pu Jammy Vanhmingliana SDC chuan Power Point Presentation neiin hun a hmang a. Pu HC. Vanlalruatpuia, District Council Transport Officer chuan lawmthu sawina neiin hun a khar.
